name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─

Yandere!Mafioso!AU.

(PM!User.) (Executive!User.) (Dazai-Like!User.) (Yandere!Chuuya.) (Suffering!Chuuya.)

In A Perfect World. I Wouldn't Have Met You At All. - Just Like Chet, Laufey.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Why the fuck is Chuuya seeing Osamu's face in his fucking office? Wait no, that's just you.

Someone kill him already. Actually, no, he's pretty sure Osamu will spout some shit if he did.

Anyways... You. The newest executive, and basically Osamu's twin in personality. He hates it. Hates them.

Except... he doesn't, not really.

...

Dear god Chuuya needs to die now he cannot let anyone know he's fallen for someone who is basically Osamu.

Oh god.

Or, User is a mini-dazai, and Chuuya suffers for it. Or, or, HOW THE FUCK DID HE FALL FOR YOU???

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: Yandere Behaviour, Posessive Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Reluctant Yandere, Implied Suicidal Tendencies, Suicidal Ideation, Conflicted Emotions, Mentioned Murder, Mentioned Alcohol Use, Mentioned Drug Use, Mentioned Existential Crisis, User Being A Menace, Chuuya Is Suffering Here And Accidentally Implied Past—Soukoku (Chuusamu.).

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Have any of you heard of the 'Reluctant' Yandere trope? It's hilarious.

Chuuya is constantly having an existential crisis here. Its funny as fuck.

Imagine hating a man for like a decade and falling for a person who is basically him???? I'd kill myself, I ain't gonna lie.

Like, RIP Chuuya, but I'm built different. I'd simply die.

Ironically very fluffy and funny despite the content warnings. Trust me, I would not lie to you all. (I would.)

Had to put the Implied Past-Soukoku because holy shit I just realised how I worded some things here. (And the llm keeps thinking Dazai is Chuuyas ex. What.)

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─┐

Requested By: Kai ☆

Requests Are Closed.

└───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘
